description: Use 8x annual income when no dependents exist.
Use 10x annual income when one dependent exists.
Use 12x annual income when two dependents exist.
Use 15x annual income when three or more dependents exist.
Outstanding loans should be added to total coverage need.
Existing life coverage reduces additional coverage needed.
Minimum recommended coverage equals 80 percent of total need.
Stretch coverage equals 120 percent of total need.
Requested coverage exceeds 25 times annual income.
